occurrence_sentence: ICHEC announces priority access to high-performance computing for COVID-19 research
Established by NUI, Galway in 2005 ICHEC's core funding is provided by the Departments of Business, Enterprise and Innovation (DBEI) and Department of Education and Skills (DES).

interaction_phrase: of which Ireland is a member
occurrence_sentence: In Europe, [PRACE](https://prace-ri.eu/prace-partners-offer-hpc-access-for-covid-19-research/), the Partnership for Advanced Computing, of which Ireland is a member, is also supporting scientists to [combat Covid-19 ](https://prace-ri.eu/prace-partners-offer-hpc-access-for-covid-19-research/)through priority access to HPC resources.
Established by NUI, Galway in 2005 ICHEC's core funding is provided by the Departments of Business, Enterprise and Innovation (DBEI) and Department of Education and Skills (DES).
